title: Sasquatch negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and send it to their cemetery. Your opponent then cannot use Lightning cards for 1 turn cycle.

effect.value: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and send it to their cemetery. Your opponent then cannot use Lightning cards for 1 turn cycle.

plan.title: Sasquatch negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent magic card with Sasquatch and verify the negation/cemetery branch resolves.

notes: Read text first: Sasquatch negates opponent magic, sends it to cemetery, then prevents opponent Lightning for 1 turn cycle.

steps: Pass priority and resolve the chain.

expectedAssertions.label: Sasquatch was played as a Lightning response
Negated magic was sent to cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm the 1 turn-cycle Lightning restriction is enforced after the negation branch.
riskNotes: This fixture proves negation/cemetery behavior; the follow-up Lightning lock needs a dedicated live-turn scenario.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
